creator: ruud@il.fontys.nl
text:
When you have WWWDIR set in /etc/make.conf phpMyAdmin will install all its files directly into that dir instead of creating its own subdir.

It will also be unable to uninstall according to this line and others like it:
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local//beast/web/www/translators.html' doesn't exist
(WWWDIR="/beast/web/www")

How-To-Repeat: Install and/or deinstall phpMyAdmin
